curation_notes: Patch commit df535f5 (merge of PR #62) identified from the advisory references. Only 1 source file changed: internal/sbi/processor/smpolicy.go. The fix moves `smData = response.SmPolicyData` from before the nil check on `response` to after the nil check, preventing a nil pointer dereference when the downstream UDR lookup returns an error with a nil response. Location derived from the patch diff and confirmed by the advisory description and stack trace (smpolicy.go:82, function HandleCreateSmPolicyRequest). Sibling processor files (ampolicy.go, bdtpolicy.go, policyauthorization.go) were checked but do not contain the same vulnerability pattern. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed from CWE-476 and the patch clearly fixing a nil pointer dereference.
